title: eID API
excerpt: api, integrate, integrators, eid, submit, kosovo, authentication, backend, contact, ask
autoSummary: The eid API is available for third-party integrators who want to add kosovo eid features into their own systems. Any software — web, mobile, or backend — that has a permanent internet connection can connect to the eidapi.

title: Signing Apps
excerpt: signing, macos, certificates, app, stamp, document, download, validity, verify, desktop
autoSummary: Desktop and mobile signing apps are used to allow using the electronic id for signing and stamping documents. Installation and usage, without any limitations, are free of charge.

title: Kosovo Wallet
excerpt: kosovo, wallet, authentication, application, developer, api, ios, license, storing, google
autoSummary: Kosovo wallet is a mobile app used to safely store the credentials of your electronic id or your electronic seal(s) It can be installed as any other mobile application from google play (for android) or from app store (for ios). Installation and usage, without any limitations, are free of charge.

title: Use Kosovo Wallet
excerpt: authentication, credential, kosovo, wallet, notifications, features, certificate, access, select, modal
autoSummary: Kosovo wallet provides you with a series of features that can be used to keep your certificate credentials safe and protected on your device. You can organise credentials and use the credentials in applications that are in the kosovo eid ecosystem and offers strong authentication.

title: Get eID
excerpt: authentication, eid, wallet, certificate, enrollment, kosovo, digitally, arbk, email, seals
autoSummary: To obtain an electronic id, you will need to go through the enrollment process at the civil registration offices (arc). For a digital seal, the process takes place at the kosovo business registration agency (arbk) for now, online enrollment is not available. This is intentional, to ensure the highest possible.

title: Introduction
excerpt: kosovo, authenticate, eid, ebanking, certificate, api, identities, enrollment, wallet, digitally
autoSummary: Kosovo eid is the national system that manages electronic identities for citizens of kosovo. Citizens can get their electronic id by going through a enrollment process at the civil registration offices ( ) counters. In a similar way, citizens can obtain an electronic seal through the enrollment process.

title: Manage eID
excerpt: certificates, password, portal, access, self, service, enrollment, profile, unlock, user
autoSummary: The self service portal is the tool that allows you to manage your certificate(s) and to migrate the wallet when you change your device. To access the self-service portal you would need the certificate information that you received during the enrollment process (the certificate user name and password).
